item.title: Posting bottom shelf memes.
item.description:
I use FB so you don't have to.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
You no longer have to wait for the posts to hit "most viral" to be notified. Now you can be notified as soon as I post, so you can catch the memes hot and fresh out of the dumpster fire. The way god intended.
Smiley Hiley tax for the #petshow Looking for more memes? Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Images of Note: EVERYONE HAS A URETHRA!
item.description:
For normal human things.
How shall we comfort ourselves?
:c
When people say metalheads are scary, this is who they're talking about.
Yes, that is Linux on the Wii.
That's not fair, the Trashcan is useful.
An Advertiser driven internet economy was a mistake.
a i r j a i l
THOSE FEET!
:3
Well that's ominous.
You know transphobes are awfy obsessed with transgender people for people who hate transgender people.
This is unironically the most Nowpunk song ever.
https://edition.cnn.com/2024/08/14/business/disney-plus-wrongful-death-lawsuit/index.html
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: In case you need another reason to hate this a-hole, he killed the educational software industry of the 80s and 90s
item.description:
https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/17/politics/video/kevin-oleary-shark-tank-harris-economic-plan-nr-digvid
https://rangerrik.com/2018/09/26/how-one-corporate-raider-destroyed-the-educational-software-market/ Full article: https://theoutline.com/post/6293/reader-rabbit-history-the-learning-company-zoombinis-carmen-sandiego
O'Leary's SoftKey acquired rival companies via hostile takeover bids, such as Compton's New Media, The Learning Company, MECC, and Broderbund. SoftKey later changed its name to The Learning Company, not unlike how Musk "founded" Tesla.
item.dc:creator: LeiraSeven

item.title: Video intermission from needing to clean out my phone in no particular order pt1
item.dc:creator: Reemerarius

item.title: MONDAY WTF Gif Dump of Chaos
item.description:
1. GET DOWN, GET DOWN!
2. SHE WENT BACK TO HOME PLANET
3
4. That escalated quickly
5. WTF
6. Sleep deprived new parents be like
7. This guy should have a part in a Terminator movie
8. WHAT IS LOVE?
9
10
11. This almost felt like an elaborate Houdini simulation
13. Martial Arts master
14
15. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just, whatever you do, don't press the big red button!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Memes vol 327
item.description:
They’re good dogs, bront
My boyfriend created his character in gta to look like me because it brings him endless entertainment to watch my likeness run around and fuck shit up. He plays NBA 2K as well and his player has a neck tattoo of my name
I LOVE MIKE FAIST and they could be- Mikey boy was adopted
Kurt Hummel
(She’s also a murderer)
Imagine you’re the motorcycle driver- likely DYING and you hear “You see that shampoo bottle now stick it up my ass push it in and out at a medium pace”
YAAASSSS FATIMA what an icon
Actual footage of Scruffy
It’s me I’m girls
Some guy at my job actually told me I’d be a cheap date because I was doing something stupid with something and making a funny noise (being mindlessly entertained) BUT THE FUCKING AUDACITY
That’s me in a cock
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax (she’s so cunty)
Liza Jane tax
Froggy tax
The wieners I played with today tax- my boyfriends thighs could probably hold like 5 wieners
LOOK AT HER!!
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.dc:creator: Boxzsak

item.title: And now we wait........
item.description: I'm a fan of pineapple on pizza (or rather, letting people enjoy things that they like), and I just wanted to stir the pot. Front page edit: Wow. There are tens of us out there!! TENS!! Who among you ordered a pizza because of this post? All of your suggestions sounded amazing and ended up ordering one myself. Bacon, Pineapple, Jalapenos, and red Onions. It's glorious. Anyways, be good to each other. We all might like different pizzas, but we can all still be at the same party.
item.dc:creator: ohgodthehorror
